events.content: Treat orchestrator harness as sanitized reporting slug: Treat orchestrator harness as sanitized reporting slug

raw.question: Treat orchestrator harness as sanitized reporting slug
raw.chosen: Treat orchestrator harness as sanitized reporting slug
raw.reasoning: Telemetry consumers only need a bounded string label; keeping a closed enum would drop newly introduced harnesses until every component was updated.

retrospective.summary: Relaxed orchestrator harness validation so env/header-provided values are sanitized reporting slugs rather than a closed enum, while keeping known process classifiers for automatic detection.
